ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case report */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the case report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory where the case was reported */,
  "confirmed_indian" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed Indian nationals */,
  "confirmed_foreign" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed foreign nationals */,
  "cured" INTEGER /* Number of cured cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., active, recovered, deceased) */,
  "is_suspected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case is suspected or confirmed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the case data (e.g., government report, hospital record, crowdsourced) */,
  "is_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_doses" INTEGER /* Number of vaccination doses received */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "is_quarantined" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is in quarantine */,
  "quarantine_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarantine */,
  "quarantine_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarantine */,
  "is_traveled_recently" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual has traveled recently */,
  "travel_details" TEXT /* Details of recent travel (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or union territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code for the state or union territory (e.g., KL for Kerala) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or union territory */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state or union territory */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state or union territory */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the state */,
  "total_recoveries" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries in the state */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., male, female) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "district" TEXT /* District of residence */,
  "pin_code" TEXT /* Pin code of the address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "is_healthcare_worker" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is a healthcare worker */,
  "is_essential_worker" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is an essential worker */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Any comorbidities the individual has (e.g., diabetes, hypertension) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_demographics" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., government, private) */,
  "bed_count" INTEGER /* Total number of beds available */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the hospital */,
  "is_covid_center" INTEGER /* Indicates if the hospital is a designated COVID-19 center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_hospitals" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message sent in the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., sent, acknowledged, ignored) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the alert */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high risk, low risk, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare worker, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data included in the report (e.g., cases, deaths) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government report, hospital record) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "data_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_data" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or union territory */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the case location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the case location */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of map (e.g., case distribution, vaccination centers) */,
  "zoom_level" INTEGER /* Zoom level of the map */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the map data is real-time */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the map data (e.g., government, hospital, crowdsourced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
